summary: First-pass smoke testing (Phase 1) covering backend auth + core endpoints and frontend flows (register, login, tasks, motivation toast, diary CRUD, timer, bottom nav, logout, protected routes, wrong-password error). All primary flows pass. Minor UI issue: Emergent badge overlaps bottom nav on mobile viewport, intercepting clicks on the rightmost tab (tab-diario) — worked around with force click / URL navigation during test.
passed: Backend root reachable (200) and CORS/cookies work with credentials
POST /api/auth/login (admin) sets httpOnly access_token cookie; GET /api/auth/me returns user (200)
POST /api/motivation returns Portuguese message (Gemini or fallback) — verified: 'Mais uma vitória do seu dia.' and 'Sinto muito orgulho do seu primeiro passo.'
Protected route /rotina redirects to /login when unauthenticated
Login with correct credentials → /rotina; wrong password shows PT-BR error 'E-mail ou senha incorretos'
Rotina: add task via task-title-input + add-task-btn; item appears with data-testid task-item-{id}
Rotina: toggle-task shows motivation-toast with PT-BR text
Rotina: delete-task removes item from list
Bottom nav tab-rotina and tab-mundo navigate correctly
MundoHoje placeholder renders ('Em breve.' + FASE 2 label) without errors
Diario: save-day-btn saves entry, appears in diary-history, form clears afterwards

failed.issue: Emergent 'Made with Emergent' badge (fixed bottom-right) overlaps the bottom navigation on mobile viewports (420x900), intercepting pointer events on tab-diario. Real user tapping the Diário tab in that zone may not register clicks reliably.
failed.evidence: Playwright click on [data-testid="tab-diario"] failed with '<a id="emergent-badge"> intercepts pointer events' until force=True was used. Screenshot shows badge overlapping the rightmost nav item.

action_items: Increase bottom padding on BottomNav or add bottom margin/safe-area so the Emergent badge does not overlap the Diário tab on mobile. Alternatively raise nav z-index above the badge or shift the badge above the nav bar.
